## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Community edition (`editions/community`)
- [ ] Paid edition (`editions/paid`)
- [ ] CI/workflows
- [ ] Docs

## Validation

List commands executed and their outcomes.

- [ ] `pytest -q` (community or paid)
- [ ] Relevant smoke test executed

## Compatibility

- [ ] Backward compatible API behavior maintained
- [ ] Breaking changes documented

## Security and Privacy

- [ ] No credentials/secrets added
- [ ] Security impact reviewed
